# fixture: state-0pct-not-yet-phased.txt
# State: Package not yet included in phased rollout (0% rollout).
# apt-cache policy output characteristic: no (phased N%) tag because the
# package is not even listed as a candidate for this host (not in version table
# as upgradable), OR the tag is absent because rollout has not started.
# DepCache.phasing_applied() returns False because there is no candidate.
# DepCache.is_upgradable() returns False.
# v3.x behaviour: Correct — package not in dist-upgrade -s Inst output.
# v4.2 expected: Package excluded (is_upgradable == False; never reaches phasing check).
#
# Source: captured pattern from apt-cache policy on a package held back entirely.
open-vm-tools:
  Installed: 2:13.0.0-2~ubuntu0.24.04.1
  Candidate: 2:13.0.0-2~ubuntu0.24.04.1
  Version table:
 *** 2:13.0.0-2~ubuntu0.24.04.1 500
        500 http://ca.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-updates/main amd64 Packages
        500 http://ca.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu noble-security/main amd64 Packages
        100 /var/lib/dpkg/status
